prompt: Create a dreamy high-fashion fine-art portrait of the Lady of Red Poppies standing in a misty field of vivid red poppies, shown from the shoulders up in a three-quarter rear profile with the face turned away and mostly obscured by a centered opaque muted rose-brown square overlay. The subject has a sharp chin-length white bob haircut with smooth blunt ends and fine visible hair strands, decorated with exactly 2 red poppy blossoms tucked into the hair, one large flower on the left side and one partially visible on the right. She wears an intricate white couture lace dress with a high collar, raised floral appliqué, embroidered petals, and delicate sculptural texture. Surround her with numerous red poppies on thin gray-green stems, including large blurred foreground blooms framing the lower edge and sides, with more soft-focus poppies receding into a pale gray foggy background. Use a shallow depth of field, macro portrait lens feel, soft diffused overcast light, elegant surreal editorial styling, strong contrast between red flowers and white hair and clothing, muted gray atmosphere, cinematic bokeh, vertical composition, ultra-detailed fabric and hair texture, serene mysterious mood.
